projectDescription: An autonomous AI agent framework that runs overnight LLM pretraining experiments on a single GPU, iterating on train.py to minimize validation bits-per-byte without human intervention.
keyFeatures: Autonomous overnight experimentation — runs ~100 experiments while you sleep
Fixed 5-minute time budget per experiment for fair cross-run comparison
val_bpb (bits per byte) metric that is vocab-size independent
Single file agent scope — agent only modifies train.py
Muon + AdamW hybrid optimizer with NorMuon variance reduction
Flash Attention 3 with sliding window patterns (SSSL)
agent-driven git branching and result logging to results.tsv
program.md as a lightweight human-authored research org specification
publicApiSurface: uv run prepare.py — one-time data download and BPE tokenizer training
uv run train.py — single 5-minute training run, outputs val_bpb summary
prepare.py: Tokenizer class (from_directory, encode, decode, get_vocab_size)
prepare.py: make_dataloader(tokenizer, B, T, split) — BOS-aligned best-fit packing dataloader
prepare.py: evaluate_bpb(model, tokenizer, batch_size) — fixed evaluation metric
train.py: GPTConfig dataclass (sequence_len, vocab_size, n_layer, n_head, n_kv_head, n_embd, window_pattern)
train.py: GPT model (forward, init_weights, setup_optimizer, estimate_flops)
train.py: MuonAdamW optimizer (combined Muon for matrices, AdamW for embeddings/scalars)
train.py hyperparameters: DEPTH, ASPECT_RATIO, HEAD_DIM, WINDOW_PATTERN, TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE, EMBEDDING_LR, MATRIX_LR, SCALAR_LR, WEIGHT_DECAY, WARMUP_RATIO, WARMDOWN_RATIO
